name: atomic-crm
title: Atomic CRM
description: A fully fledged CRM application built with Shadcn Admin Kit

files.content:

import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"; export const Welcome = () => ( Your CRM Starter Kit

Atomic CRM {" "} is a template designed to help you quickly build your own CRM.

This demo runs on a mock API, so you can explore and modify the data. It resets on reload. The full version uses Supabase for the backend.

Powered by{" "} shadcn-admin-kit , Atomic CRM is fully open-source. You can find the code at{" "} marmelab/atomic-crm .

);

export const sizes = [
  { id: 1, name: "1 employee" },
  { id: 10, name: "2-9 employees" },
  { id: 50, name: "10-49 employees" },
  { id: 250, name: "50-249 employees" },
  { id: 500, name: "250 or more employees" },
];

/**
 * Derive a stable slug value from a display label.
 * e.g. "Communication Services" → "communication-services"
 *
 * Must stay in sync with the SQL equivalent in
 * supabase/migrations/20260211194545_app_configuration.sql
 */
export const toSlug = (label: string): string =>
  label
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
    .replace(/^-|-$/g, "");
